# CVOpenGLESTexture

**Type Alias**

A reference to a Core Video texture-based image buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias CVOpenGLESTexture = CVImageBuffer
```

## Discussion

Core Video OpenGLES textures are managed by a [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVOpenGLESTextureCache].
